description_long: This house features a modern, minimalist design with a flat roof and a predominantly black and white color palette. The front facade includes a small green lawn, a set of steps leading to the main entrance, and a covered patio area with two circular features, possibly seating or planters. The structure is composed of clean, geometric lines and large rectangular volumes, with a mix of solid and open spaces. Windows are arranged in horizontal strips and asymmetrical placements, providing natural light to the interior. The exterior walls appear to be constructed from concrete or stucco, with some sections featuring large glass panels. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, suitable for an urban residential neighborhood.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with a black and white exterior, geometric lines, and a small front lawn with steps and a covered patio. The design features horizontal windows and a minimalist, urban aesthetic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, green lawn, steps, and a covered patio with two circular features.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated structure, flat roof, and minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house with limited window openings and a continuation of the flat roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more window strips and the overall length of the house, as well as the green lawn at the front.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a set of steps, a simple door, a small green lawn, and a covered patio area with minimal decorative elements.
